raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jepſchu to Sihreſu
pehſs maſā. Bulkā atgahje/
fchu nodeve teem tas KUNGS
enn tohti leelu Karra-Spehku
ohkā/ tapehz ka ſchee to KUN-
l ſawo Tehwo Deewu bij at-
hufchi/ ir pahr Joaſn iſlaide
to Sohdibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee no winna bij
at nogahjuſchi/) io tee paiuet-
vinnu tehti neweffelu.) Tad
rija winna Kalpi prett win-
weenu Derribu ta Preestera
adus Behrnu Affina deht/
nokawe to uſ winna Gultu/
tas noimire/ un tee aprakke
Dahwida Pilli/ bet Rehnina
opôs winni to ne rakke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ſchee irr/ kas Derribu
tt winnu darriſchi/ Sabads
meatas tahs Ammonitere nes
hs/ un Josabads Sunrites
s Moabiterenes Dehſs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winna Dehſt/ un ta
flu-Dcaudas Kohpa/kas win-
n bija uſlikta/ un ta Deewa
mma Ustaiffchana/ rangi/
irr wiſs raſtihts eckſch to
nian Grahmataſ Stah-
n/ un winna Dehſs Amazi-
tappe par Rehninu winna
eta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mazijus btja diwidef-
nits un peezeus Gaddus
wezz/ kad tas par Reh-
ninu tappe/ un waldija diwidef-
mits un dewinus Gaddus Jeru-
salemê/ un winna Mahtei btja
Joadaṇa Wahṛda no Jerusale-
mes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas tam
KUNGSAM labbi patikfe/ to-
mihr ne ar ſkaidru Sirḍi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu wiꞥſch ſawa Wal-
ſibā bij stiprinajees/ tad nokawe
wiꞥſch favus Kalpus/ kas win-
na Tehwu to Rehninu bij ka-
wufcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet winna Behrnus
wiꞥſch ne nokawe/ jo wiꞥſch dar-
rija ta ka Mohsus Baustibas
Grahmata raſtihts irr/ fur tas
KUNGS pawehlejs/ fazzidams:
Teem Tehweem ne buhs par
teem Behrneem nomirt/ ir teem
Behrneem ne buhs par teem
Tehweem nomirt/ bet ifweens
lai ſawu paſchu Grehku deht no-
mirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amazijus ſapulzinaja
Juḥdu/ nn eezeble tohs pehz to
Tehwu Naimneem/ par Ahwer-
ſteem un par Kapteinem zaur
wiſfu Juḥdu un Benjaminu/
un ſkaittja tohs no teem/ kas di-
widefints un wairak Gaddus
wezzi bija/ un atradde no teem
trihs ſints reiſi tuhkſtoſchus is-
laſitus/ kas warreja Karra cet/
un
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
